calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Appointment If Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robyn Christo (appearing by Court Call) for Michael Wilsey.

The Court raised the concern of the language in the order that waived future accounting. Ms. Christo reported that her client would be satisfied as long as a successor trustee is in place. The Court stated that if Mr. Wilsey intends to resign in the near future, then the accounting issues could be addressed at that time. The Petition for Order accepting Resignation of Trustee, etc. is granted (subject to modification and review of this order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Appointment If Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
Petn For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee & For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
